channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flytipped screen by crown and anchor pub, 15th May
item.description:
Fly tipped TV by crown and anchor pub. Please clear.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 90, Palace Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Big graffiti on wall, 14th May
item.description:
Eyesore

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Crossway, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamp column on island not working, 14th May
item.description:
Lamp column on centre island on A2 exit not working
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamp column not working, 14th May
item.description:
The last lamp column on the outside before the exit to Bexley is not working.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bourne Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: White pen tag on Shortlands Station green equipment cabinet in the car park fronting Shortlands Rd by the southern boundary wall adjoining Nightingale Court., 14th May
item.description:
White pen tag on Shortlands Station green equipment cabinet in the car park fronting Shortlands Rd by the southern boundary wall adjoining Nightingale Court. About 40cm x 10cm. Visible from public footway.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shortlands Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Can tree outside 16 Murray Ave be inspected, 14th May
item.description:
Please inspect this tree. Is it dead? Please replace if it is.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Murray Avenue, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken clear glass bottle, like a, spirits bottle, large and small shards on public footway fronting maisonettes, 3-4 Park ham Court, Shortlands Rd, Shortlands at the jct with Mays Hill Rd. Been pushed under foliage hedge., 14th May
item.description:
Broken clear glass bottle, like a, spirits bottle, large and small shards on public footway fronting maisonettes, 3-4 Park ham Court, Shortlands Rd, Shortlands at the jct with Mays Hill Rd. Been pushed under foliage hedge.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shortlands Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping outside 3 sewdley st, e5 0ax, 14th May
item.description:
Domestic rubbish dumped outside 3 Sewdley St, E5 0AX
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sewdley Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No e- parking bays, lime been using the street for bikes, 14th May
item.description:
This is residential street, cannot be use for lime biikes, or Forrest. Residents have paid to park on the street these bikes are right on front of our homes. We have no privacy and is preventing vehicles from parking.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Vicarage Grove, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned fridge, most likely abandoned by 4 Brinkworth Way, 14th May
item.description:
A fridge has been abandoned outside 4 Brinkworth way and is now blocking the pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brinkworth Way, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Kensington gore Albert hall mansions, 14th May
item.description:
Driver park in permit holders only parking spot and have engine on for minimum 10 minutes I ask him if he have a permit he sad no- engine still go on. He sad that he parked here long time ago and he won’t go becaouse he his waiting for a client form Albert Hall - it means since few hours it starts at 7-8 and finished around 22.30. Engine was till on. I want to raport it

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Electric bike obstruction, 14th May
item.description:
Junction, double yellows and pavement heavily obstructed by electric hire bikes. Repeatedly like this.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Brighton Terrace, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Neighbours fly tipping rubbish, 14th May
item.description:
Residents of 15 Lynsted close (currently have hunters to let sign outside) left their rubbish on the side of the road and admitted it to us when confronted

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albion Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal Dumping – Washing Machine Left Outside, 14th May
item.description:
Hello, There is an abandoned washing machine left on the pavement/in front of my house for over a month. It appears to be illegally dumped waste (fly-tipping). Please could this be removed? Location: SE16 6RU I have attached photos. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hawke Place, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shopping trolley and litter in multiple places, 14th May
item.description:
We have a litter problem. There's litter in the car park in Hackington Crescent and the surrounding grassy areas. There's a shopping trolley outside the block of flats to Hackington Crescent.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hackington Crescent, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Commercial bins, 14th May
item.description:
This area outside Gail’s and Oxfam has some LBH commercial bins, but it now also seems to have some domestic bins which shouldn’t be here and are being used as public litter bins for Gail’s customers. In addition, people fly top daily on the grassy area.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lauriston Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Motorcycle helmet abandoned, 14th May
item.description:
It's been there for over a week. Assumed it's been flytipped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hackington Crescent, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on white utility box, 14th May
item.description:
Antisemitic graffiti on white utility box There’s graffiti depicting antisemitic caricature tropes on what looks like a white electrical box close to the entrance of the Blackwall tunnel northbound on tunnel avenue where there’s a bend in the road. I saw it today for the first time so I’m not sure how long it’s been there.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tunnel Avenue, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Developer keeps dumping rubbish onto pavement, 14th May
item.description:
Developer is not hiring skips instead they’re dumping rubbish outside their house onto pavement and street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fordyce Road, Hither Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on Underside of Ha' Penny Steps Bridge (South), 14th May
item.description:
Graffiti on Underside of Ha' Penny Steps Bridge (South)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ha'Penny Steps, North Kensington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
